mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, stock_quantity, `condition`, location, image_urls, `status`, created_at, updated_at,latitude,longitude) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity}, #{condition}, #{location}, #{imageUrls}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},#{latitude},#{longitude})
INSERT INTO user_products (user_id, product_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, stock_quantity, `condition`, location, image_urls, `status`, created_at, updated_at,latitude,longitude FROM products ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, stock_quantity, `condition`, location, image_urls, `status`, created_at, updated_at,latitude,longitude FROM products WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, stock_quantity, `condition`, location, image_urls, `status`, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.seller_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.stock_quantity, p.`condition`, p.location, p.image_urls, p.`status`, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.latitude, p.longitude, s.username, s.email, s.phone, s.address,s.user_id,s.avatar_url FROM products p LEFT JOIN users s ON p.seller_id = s.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT pi.id, pi.product_id, pi.image_url, pi.sort_order, pi.created_at FROM product_images pi JOIN products p ON pi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{delta}, `status` = CASE WHEN stock_quantity + #{delta} > 0 THEN '在售' ELSE `status` END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE products SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity - #{delta}, `status` = CASE WHEN stock_quantity - #{delta} <= 0 THEN '下架' ELSE `status` END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock_quantity >= #{delta}
UPDATE products SET stock_quantity = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
